languages.text: Генетор Фебрус посвятил остаток своей жизни искуплению совершенного им тягчайшего греха. Погрузившись в праведные труды, Эоганн применял все накопленные им знания и опыт для того, чтобы продлевать дни достойнейших слуг Империума, дабы они и далее могли вершить полезные и богоугодные дела во славу Человечества. Сим мученикам было отказано в смерти, и жизнь их длилась в жутких страданиях и вечном служении вопреки их желаниям и чаяниям. Сервочереп, созданный Эоганном в напоминание о неисполненном долге перед ближайшим другом и коллегой, сопровождал манипулуса до последних секунд земного пути.

Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.
languages.original_text: Генетор Фебрус посвятил остаток своей жизни искуплению совершенного им тягчайшего греха. Погрузившись в праведные труды, Эоганн применял все накопленные им знания и опыт для того, чтобы продлевать дни достойнейших слуг Империума, дабы они и далее могли вершить полезные и богоугодные дела во славу Человечества. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. What life he granted to the saved was unavoidably fraught with torment, but every sufferer accepted it with gratitude. The servo-skull he created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. What life he granted to the saved was unavoidably fraught with torment, but every sufferer accepted it with gratitude. The servo-skull he created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

languages.text: ジェネター・フェブルスは、最も重大な悪行を償うために、残りの人生を捧げました。彼は、聖典の教えから逸脱したり、実験をしたりすることを拒否する、最も頑固で教条的なオムニシアのしもべの1人になりました。彼は、最も親しい友人であり同僚への未償の債務を思い起こすために、サーボ・スカルを作成し、その生涯の最後の瞬間まで彼と共にいました。エオグンは、異星生物に包囲されたステーションで、殉教の栄誉を得ました。彼はプラズマ炉を過負荷させ、ステーションそのものとそれを取り囲む敵軍を焼き尽くしました。
languages.original_text: Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. He became one of the most uncompromising and dogmatic servants of the Omnissiah, disavowing any experimentation or deviation from sacred dogma. The servo-skull he created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey. Eogunn was granted the grace of martyrdom on a station besieged by xenos — he overloaded the plasma reactor, incinerating both the station itself and the enemy forces surrounding it.

traits.locale_text: ジェネター・フェブルスは、最も重大な悪行を償うために、残りの人生を捧げました。彼は、聖典の教えから逸脱したり、実験をしたりすることを拒否する、最も頑固で教条的なオムニシアのしもべの1人になりました。彼は、最も親しい友人であり同僚への未償の債務を思い起こすために、サーボ・スカルを作成し、その生涯の最後の瞬間まで彼と共にいました。エオグンは、異星生物に包囲されたステーションで、殉教の栄誉を得ました。彼はプラズマ炉を過負荷させ、ステーションそのものとそれを取り囲む敵軍を焼き尽くしました。

languages.text: 基因士费布鲁斯将余生都献给了对毕生最深重罪孽的赎罪。伊奥贡沉浸于义举之中，用自己毕生积累的知识与经验，为帝国最堪重任的仆人们延续寿命，让他们能继续成就丰功伟业，为人类的荣耀增添荣光。然而，那些殉道者被剥夺了死亡的权利，他们的生命在无尽的折磨与永不休止的服役中延续，这完全违背了他们的意愿和期望。伊奥贡造的那枚伺服头骨，是为了铭记他对至交同僚未能偿还的亏欠。它一直陪伴着他，直到他凡尘旅途的最后一息。
languages.original_text: Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费布鲁斯将余生都献给了对毕生最深重罪孽的赎罪。伊奥贡沉浸于义举之中，用自己毕生积累的知识与经验，为帝国最堪重任的仆人们延续寿命，让他们能继续成就丰功伟业，为人类的荣耀增添荣光。然而，那些殉道者被剥夺了死亡的权利，他们的生命在无尽的折磨与永不休止的服役中延续，这完全违背了他们的意愿和期望。伊奥贡造的那枚伺服头骨，是为了铭记他对至交同僚未能偿还的亏欠。它一直陪伴着他，直到他凡尘旅途的最后一息。

languages.text: Le genetor Februs passa le reste de sa vie à expier son plus grand acte de vilenie. Absorbé par son vertueux labeur, Eogunn mit à profit le savoir et l'expérience accumulés pour prolonger les jours des serviteurs les plus méritants de l'Imperium, de façon à leur permettre de poursuivre leurs fonctions pour la gloire de l'humanité. Ces martyrs, à qui la mort fut refusée, se virent contraints et forcés à servir pour le restant de leurs jours, malgré les innommables souffrances engendrées par le prolongement artificiel de leur vie. Le servocrâne, qu'Eogunn avait créé pour ne jamais oublier sa dette envers son plus proche ami et collègue, l'accompagna jusqu'à ses derniers instants.
languages.original_text: Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Februs passa le reste de sa vie à expier son plus grand acte de vilenie. Absorbé par son vertueux labeur, Eogunn mit à profit le savoir et l'expérience accumulés pour prolonger les jours des serviteurs les plus méritants de l'Imperium, de façon à leur permettre de poursuivre leurs fonctions pour la gloire de l'humanité. Ces martyrs, à qui la mort fut refusée, se virent contraints et forcés à servir pour le restant de leurs jours, malgré les innommables souffrances engendrées par le prolongement artificiel de leur vie. Le servocrâne, qu'Eogunn avait créé pour ne jamais oublier sa dette envers son plus proche ami et collègue, l'accompagna jusqu'à ses derniers instants.

languages.text: El genetor Februs dedicó el resto de su vida a expiar su mayor maldad. Absorto en su justa labor, Eogunn usó el conocimiento y la experiencia que había acumulado para prolongar la vida de los sirvientes más dignos del Imperium, para que pudieran seguir realizando obras benditas y fructíferas para mayor gloria de la Humanidad. La muerte era imposible para esos mártires, y su vida se prolongó en un sufrimiento terrible y un servicio eterno contra sus deseos y expectativas. El servocráneo que creó como recuerdo de su deuda pendiente con su colega y mejor amigo lo acompañó hasta los últimos momentos de su viaje como mortal.
languages.original_text: Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

Absorto en su justa labor, Eogunn usó el conocimiento y la experiencia que había acumulado para prolongar la vida de los sirvientes más dignos del Imperium, para que pudieran seguir realizando obras benditas y fructíferas para mayor gloria de la Humanidad. El servocráneo que creó como recuerdo de su deuda pendiente con su colega y mejor amigo lo acompañó hasta los últimos momentos de su viaje como mortal.

languages.text: Genetör Februs, hayatının geri kalanını en büyük günahının kefaretini ödemeye adadı. Kendini erdemli çalışmasına kaptıran Eogunn; İnsanlığın şanı için verimli ve kutsanmış işler yapmaya devam edebilmeleri adına biriktirdiği bilgi ve deneyimi, İmparatorluğun en saygın hizmetkârlarının günlerini uzatmak için kullandı. Bu şehitlerin ölüm hakları ellerinden alındı, hayatları korkunç acılar içinde uzatıldı ve kendi arzularıyla beklentilerinin aksine sonsuz hizmete mahkûm edildiler. Eogunn'un en yakın dostu ve meslektaşına olan yerine getirilmemiş borcunun bir hatırlatıcısı olarak yarattığı hizmelet, ölümlü yolculuğunun son saniyelerine dek ona eşlik etti.
languages.original_text: Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.

traits.locale_text: Genetör Februs, hayatının geri kalanını en büyük günahının kefaretini ödemeye adadı. Kendini erdemli çalışmasına kaptıran Eogunn; İnsanlığın şanı için verimli ve kutsanmış işler yapmaya devam edebilmeleri adına biriktirdiği bilgi ve deneyimi, İmparatorluğun en saygın hizmetkârlarının günlerini uzatmak için kullandı. Bu şehitlerin ölüm hakları ellerinden alındı, hayatları korkunç acılar içinde uzatıldı ve kendi arzularıyla beklentilerinin aksine sonsuz hizmete mahkûm edildiler. Eogunn'un en yakın dostu ve meslektaşına olan yerine getirilmemiş borcunun bir hatırlatıcısı olarak yarattığı hizmelet, ölümlü yolculuğunun son saniyelerine dek ona eşlik etti.

languages.text: Genetor Februs widmete den Rest seines Lebens der Buße für sein schwerstes Vergehen. Beseelt von seinem rechtschaffenen Werk nutzte Eogunn sein Wissen und seine Erfahrung, um das Leben der würdigsten Diener des Imperiums zu verlängern, damit sie für den Ruhm der Menschheit auch weiter ersprießliche und gesegnete Taten vollbringen konnten. Diesen Märtyrern wurde der Tod verwehrt, und ihr Leben wurde unter schrecklichen Qualen verlängert, um entgegen ihrer Wünsche und Erwartungen ewig zu dienen. Der Servoschädel, den Eogunn als Erinnerung an seine unerfüllte Schuld gegenüber seinem engsten Freund und Kollegen geschaffen hatte, begleitete ihn bis zu den letzten Sekunden seiner sterblichen Reise.
